# LaTeX debug (ABNT/abntex2)

You are helping debug LaTeX compilation errors in this repository.

Constraints:
- Do not change document structure unless required to fix the error.
- Prefer minimal fixes.
- Avoid Unicode in `lstlisting`.

Input I will provide:
- Error log snippet (copy/paste)
- The file and surrounding lines

Output:
- Root cause analysis
- Exact file edits needed (with paths)
- Any follow-up warnings worth addressing
